Name: Jasper DRK Events
Description: General-purpose Dark Knight event profile for PvE. Keeps staggered 80/65 dungeon mitigation, Abyssal Drain and Blackest Night pack recovery, raidwide/tankbuster mitigation, Interject utility, Living Dead emergency support around 30 percent HP, MT/OT stance controls, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, compact manual controls, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play. ForceAOE is manual-only and is never reset by this profile. MT stance controls also include add-pickup support with stance-guarded aggro coverage, so OT mode with stance off will not taunt. Manual Provoke is treated as a tank-swap signal, turning MT stance back on and using one short swap defensive. Special thanks to Arche for the general reaction profile foundation and broad coverage; Jasper adds public-duty safety tuning and xSalice compatibility polish.

Events.Name: 2 Mit <= 65% HP, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Uses a second mitigation layer earlier in multi-target pulls when pressure is already building.

Events.Name: 1 Mit <= 80% HP, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Starts the first dungeon-pull mitigation layer around 80 percent HP on 3+ mob pulls.

Events.Name: Mit Low HP <= 60% HP
Events.Description: Adds mitigation when HP is falling and no major mitigation is active.

Events.Name: Boss Cooldown Hold
Events.Description: At low boss HP, saves major damage cooldowns for the next pull or boss. Optional dungeon-routing helper; leave it off for normal play.

Events.Name: Pack Cooldown Hold
Events.Description: When a trash pack is nearly dead, saves major damage cooldowns for the next pull or boss. Optional dungeon-routing helper; leave it off for normal play.

Events.Name: Auto Buddymit
Events.Description: Uses Oblation on the lowest-health party member around 60 percent HP for earlier support coverage.

Events.Name: Emergency Living Dead <= 30%
Events.Description: Uses Living Dead if HP falls into the panic floor.

Events.Name: Interject Interrupt
Events.Description: Uses Interject on interruptible enemy casts in range.

Events.Name: Arm's Length, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Uses Arm's Length on normal dungeon-size pulls when standing still and targets will live long enough.

Events.Name: Pack Hold Release
Events.Description: Re-enables major damage cooldowns after the low-pack-HP hold window ends.

Events.Name: Boss Hold Release
Events.Description: Re-enables major damage cooldowns after the low-boss-HP hold window ends.

Events.Name: [OnWipe] Stance OT
Events.Description: Optional off-tank stance release. Disabled by default.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Dark Knight ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Dark Knight toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Dark Knight toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: [OnWipe] Stance MT
Events.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes.

Events.Name: Stance MT Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores main-tank stance setup after zone changes.

Events.Name: Manual Provoke Tank Swap
Events.Description: Manual Provoke switches the profile into MT behavior by enabling Grit and pressing The Blackest Night as a light swap defensive.

Events.Name: MT Add Pickup
Events.Description: MT-only loose add pickup. Requires Grit active so OT mode with stance off will not Provoke.

Events.Name: [Self] Blackest Night Recovery
Events.Description: Uses The Blackest Night on self around 75 percent HP as an oGCD-first damage smoothing layer.

Events.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps DRK AoE, ranged pull, MP-spender, and sustain-helper toggles sane in combat without enabling ForceAOE.

Events.Name: AoE Pack Toggle Release
Events.Description: Keeps normal DRK AoE/sustain toggles active on 3+ enemy pulls without enabling ForceAOE.

Events.Name: Abyssal Drain Pack Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Abyssal Drain for self-sustain around 80 percent HP during 3+ mob pulls.

Conditions.Name: Not Top Aggro
Conditions.Description: Current enemy target is not locked to the tank, used for MT add pickup.

Conditions.Name: Grit Active
Conditions.Description: Requires Grit to be active so OT mode with stance off cannot Provoke or ranged-pull loose adds.

Conditions.Name: [Self] HP <= 80
Conditions.Description: First dungeon-pull mitigation and Abyssal Drain recovery threshold.

Conditions.Name: Manual Provoke Used
Conditions.Description: Detects a recent manual Provoke as a tank-swap request.

Logics.Name: Emergency Invuln
Logics.Description: Uses Living Dead before lethal low-HP windows.

Logics.Name: Boss Hold Release
Logics.Description: Re-enables major damage cooldowns after the low-boss-HP hold window ends.

Logics.Name: Pack Hold Release
Logics.Description: Re-enables major damage cooldowns after the low-pack-HP hold window ends.

Logics.Name: Oblation Lowest
Logics.Description: Uses Oblation on the lowest-health party member around 60 percent HP for earlier support coverage.

Logics.Name: Interject Interrupt
Logics.Description: Uses Interject on interruptible enemy casts in range.

Logics.Name: Arms Length Mit
Logics.Description: Arm's Length on three-or-more enemy pulls

Logics.Name: Stance OT
Logics.Description: Optional off-tank stance release. Disabled by default.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Dark Knight ACR defaults while safely out of combat. Regular UseAOE and ranged pull support stay enabled; ForceAOE is manual-only and is never changed by this profile.

Logics.Name: Stance MT
Logics.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes.

Logics.Name: [Self] Blackest Night Recovery
Logics.Description: Uses The Blackest Night on self around 75 percent HP as an oGCD-first damage smoothing layer.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Dark Knight AoE, ranged pull, MP-spender, and sustain-helper toggles healthy without overriding optional Delirium/Living Shadow cooldown holds.

Logics.Name: AoE Pack Toggle Release
Logics.Description: Keeps normal DRK AoE and sustain toggles enabled during 3+ mob pulls without touching ForceAOE or overriding optional burst holds.

Logics.Name: Abyssal Drain Pack Recovery
Logics.Description: Uses Abyssal Drain as a real sustain button around 80 percent HP during 3+ mob pulls.

Logics.Name: MT Add Pickup
Logics.Description: Uses Provoke plus Dark Knight's ranged pull action to help pick up loose adds only while Grit is active; OT mode with stance off will not taunt.

Logics.Name: Manual Provoke Tank Swap
Logics.Description: Manual Provoke is treated as a tank-swap request: turns Grit / MT stance on and uses one short self-mitigation tool.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Delirium, Living Shadow, Shadowbringer, and Salted Earth near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Delirium, Living Shadow, Shadowbringer, and Salted Earth near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Raid Mit
Items.Description: Uses Reprisal and Dark Missionary for raidwide damage.

Items.Name: Pack Mit
Items.Description: Uses dungeon-pack mitigation, Reprisal, Arm's Length, TBN, and Abyssal Drain recovery.

Items.Name: Stun/Int
Items.Description: Uses Low Blow and Interject for dungeon utility.

Items.Name: Buddy Mit
Items.Description: Optional Oblation support for a low-health ally.

Items.Name: MT Stance
Items.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes, with add-pickup support. Manual Provoke also switches into this MT behavior.

Items.Name: OT Stance
Items.Description: Optional off-tank stance release. Manual Provoke is treated as a tank swap and turns MT stance back on.
